titleZh: 上市公司董事、监事和高级管理人员所持本公司股份及其变动管理规则
titleEn: Rules on the Shares Held by Directors, Supervisors, and Senior Management of Listed Companies and Changes Therein
issuingBodyZh: 中国证券监督管理委员会
summaryZh: 规定上市公司董事、监事和高级管理人员持股锁定、窗口期、申报和变动披露等核心要求，是董监高股份合规管理的基础规则。
summaryEn: Sets the core requirements on lock-up, trading windows, reporting, and disclosure for shares held by directors, supervisors, and senior management of listed companies.
